<h1>Source code for booktx.tasks</h1><div class="highlight"><pre>
<span></span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Translation-task creation, durable task paths, and submission hints.</span>

<span class="sd">Centralizes the durable-file layout and id derivation for translation tasks</span>
<span class="sd">so the command layer stops reconstructing paths and submit-hints inline.</span>

<span class="sd">Profile-layout projects (primary):</span>

<span class="sd">    translations/&lt;profile&gt;/tasks/&lt;id&gt;.json</span>
<span class="sd">    translations/&lt;profile&gt;/tasks/&lt;id&gt;.source.block.txt</span>
<span class="sd">    translations/&lt;profile&gt;/ingest/&lt;id&gt;.json</span>
<span class="sd">    translations/&lt;profile&gt;/ingest/&lt;id&gt;.block.txt</span>

<span class="sd">Legacy single-layout projects (compatibility only):</span>

<span class="sd">    .booktx/tasks/&lt;id&gt;.json</span>
<span class="sd">    .booktx/tasks/&lt;id&gt;.source.block.txt</span>
<span class="sd">    .booktx/ingest/&lt;id&gt;.json</span>
<span class="sd">    .booktx/ingest/&lt;id&gt;.block.txt</span>

<span class="sd">All task-path access goes through ``translation_task_dir(project)`` which</span>
<span class="sd">enforces the profile-required guard for source-only projects. The</span>
<span class="sd">``TaskPaths`` value object bundles the four per-task files and renders the</span>
<span class="sd">project-relative display strings and submit commands the CLI prints.</span>
<span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<span class="c1"># ruff: noqa: E501</span>

<div class="viewcode-block" id="project_relative">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.tasks.project_relative">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">project_relative</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">root</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return a stable project-relative display path when possible.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">relative_to</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">as_posix</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">as_posix</span><span class="p">()</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="make_task_id">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.tasks.make_task_id">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">make_task_id</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">first_record_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Derive a deterministic, path-safe task id.</span>

<span class="sd">    Uses a stable ``blake2s`` digest (``digest_size=4``) of the joined record</span>
<span class="sd">    ids instead of Python&#39;s process-randomized ``hash()``, plus a</span>
<span class="sd">    seconds-precision UTC timestamp so same-day collisions are extremely</span>
<span class="sd">    unlikely.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">stamp</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">datetime</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">now</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">timezone</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">utc</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strftime</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;%Y%m</span><span class="si">%d</span><span class="s2">T%H%M%SZ&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">record_part</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">first_record_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;-&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">digest</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">hashlib</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">blake2s</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;|&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">encode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="n">digest_size</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">4</span>
    <span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">hexdigest</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;bt-task-</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">stamp</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">-</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">-</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_part</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">-</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">digest</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="TaskPaths">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.tasks.TaskPaths">[docs]</a>
<span class="nd">@dataclass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">frozen</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">slots</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">TaskPaths</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;The four durable files owned by one translation task.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">task_json</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span>
    <span class="n">source_block</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span>
    <span class="n">ingest_json</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span>

<div class="viewcode-block" id="TaskPaths.display">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.tasks.TaskPaths.display">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">display</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">root</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">RuntimeMode</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TaskPathDisplay</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">TaskPathDisplay</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">task_json</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">display_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_json</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">mode</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
                <span class="k">else</span> <span class="n">project_relative</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_json</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">root</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">source_block</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">display_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_block</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">mode</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
                <span class="k">else</span> <span class="n">project_relative</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_block</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">root</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">ingest_json</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">display_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ingest_json</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">mode</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
                <span class="k">else</span> <span class="n">project_relative</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ingest_json</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">root</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="n">ingest_block</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">display_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ingest_block</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">)</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">mode</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
                <span class="k">else</span> <span class="n">project_relative</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ingest_block</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">root</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="p">)</span></div>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">block_submit_hint</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>

    <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">profile_part</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">mode</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">name</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.booktx&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">profile_part</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot; --profile </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;booktx translate insert .</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">profile_part</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> --task-id </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> &quot;</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;--file &quot;</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">display_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ingest_block</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">if</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">is</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">not</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">else</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">project_relative</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ingest_block</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;--format block&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span></div>
