    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">json_submit_hint</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">root</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">RuntimeMode</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">profile_part</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">mode</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">name</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.booktx&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">profile_part</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot; --profile </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;booktx translate insert .</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">profile_part</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> --task-id </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> &quot;</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;--json-file &quot;</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">display_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ingest_json</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">if</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">is</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">not</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">else</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">project_relative</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ingest_json</span><span class="p">,</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span></div>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="TaskPaths.block_stdin_submit_hint">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.tasks.TaskPaths.block_stdin_submit_hint">[docs]</a>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">block_stdin_submit_hint</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">RuntimeMode</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">profile_part</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">mode</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">name</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.booktx&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">profile_part</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot; --profile </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parent</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">name</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;booktx translate insert .</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">profile_part</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> --task-id </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> &quot;</span>
            <span class="s2">&quot;--stdin --format block &lt;&lt;&#39;BOOKTX&#39;&quot;</span>
        <span class="p">)</span></div>
</div>



<span class="nd">@dataclass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">frozen</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">slots</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">TaskPathDisplay</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Project-relative display strings for a task&#39;s durable files.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">task_json</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">source_block</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">ingest_json</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">ingest_block</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="task_paths">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.tasks.task_paths">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">task_paths</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TaskPaths</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the :class:`TaskPaths` bundle for ``task_id``.</span>

<span class="sd">    Routes through ``translation_task_dir(project)`` so a source-only</span>
<span class="sd">    project (no selected profile) hits the profile-required guard instead of</span>
<span class="sd">    silently assuming legacy ``.booktx/tasks`` paths.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.config</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">translation_task_dir</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">TaskPaths</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">task_json</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">translation_task_dir</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">/</span> <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">.json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_block</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">translation_task_source_block_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">ingest_json</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">translation_ingest_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">ingest_block</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">translation_ingest_block_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">),</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="write_ingest_template">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.tasks.write_ingest_template">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">write_ingest_template</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationTask</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Create the durable JSON submission file for a task without overwriting work.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">translation_ingest_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">exists</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">path</span>
    <span class="n">payload</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;schema_version&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;profile&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;task_id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;translation_version&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_version</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;records&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="p">[{</span><span class="s2">&quot;id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;target&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">json</span>

    <span class="n">write_json_text_atomic</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">json</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">dumps</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">payload</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">indent</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ensure_ascii</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">path</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="write_block_ingest_template">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.tasks.write_block_ingest_template">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">write_block_ingest_template</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationTask</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">RuntimeMode</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Create the durable block submission file for a task without overwriting work.</span>

<span class="sd">    The file starts with metadata comment headers (ignored by the block parser)</span>
<span class="sd">    followed by one ``&gt;&gt;&gt; RECORD_ID`` header per record. The agent fills in the</span>
<span class="sd">    target text under each header.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">translation_ingest_block_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">exists</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">path</span>
    <span class="n">paths</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">task_paths</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">display</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">paths</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">display</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">root</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source_display</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">display</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_block</span>
    <span class="n">block_display</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">display</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ingest_block</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.command_hints</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">translate_insert_command</span>

    <span class="n">submit_hint</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">translate_insert_command</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">task_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">file_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">block_display</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">context_display_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_view_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;context.json&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;context.md&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_view_path</span>
        <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">record_chunks</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">({</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">})</span>
    <span class="n">headers</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;# booktx block submission&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# profile: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;none&#39;</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# target: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# task: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# chapter: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rstrip</span><span class="p">(),</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# record_chunks: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="s1">&#39;, &#39;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record_chunks</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;# note: record ids are chunk-based; record id prefixes may differ from chapter ids&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# translation_version: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_version</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;none&#39;</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# baseline: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">baseline_ref</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translation_version</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;none&#39;</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# baseline_sha256: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;&#39;</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# context_sha256: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_sha256</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;&#39;</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# context_view_sha256: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_view_sha256</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;&#39;</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# context_notes_scope: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_notes_scope</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;&#39;</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# context_target_chapter_id: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_target_chapter_id</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;&#39;</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# context_notes_through_chapter_id: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_notes_through_chapter_id</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;&#39;</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# context_view_path: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_view_path</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;&#39;</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# context_file: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">context_display_path</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# source_sha256: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;&#39;</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# source: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">source_display</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# submit: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">submit_hint</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;# note: submit only this block file; the JSON template targets stay empty unless you use JSON mode&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">parts</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;&gt;&gt;&gt; </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">write_text_atomic</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">headers</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">parts</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rstrip</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">path</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="write_task_source_block">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.tasks.write_task_source_block">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">write_task_source_block</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationTask</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">Path</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Create the durable source-view file for a task without overwriting work.</span>

<span class="sd">    Holds the original source text for each record in the task so a coding</span>
<span class="sd">    agent can translate against a stable file instead of a large stdout dump.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">translation_task_source_block_path</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">exists</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">path</span>
    <span class="n">parts</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# profile: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;none&#39;</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# target: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# task: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">task_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# chapter: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rstrip</span><span class="p">(),</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# unit: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">unit</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# records: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_count</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# source words: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_words</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# applicable_termbase_sha256: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">applicable_termbase_sha256</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="ow">or</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="s1">&#39;&#39;</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">task_snapshots</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">entry_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">snapshot</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">snapshot</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">applicable_termbase</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">task_snapshots</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="p">[</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;# applicable termbase:&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;# id | source cue | preferred | forbidden | note&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">snapshot</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">task_snapshots</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">values</span><span class="p">(),</span> <span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="k">lambda</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">entry_id</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">preferred</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot; / &quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_preferred</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;(none)&quot;</span>
            <span class="n">forbidden</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot; / &quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_forbidden</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;(none)&quot;</span>
            <span class="n">note</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sense</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rationale</span>
            <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">entry_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> | </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> | </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">preferred</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> | </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">forbidden</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> | </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rstrip</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">context</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_context</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">glossary</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">glossary</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">context</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">FileNotFoundError</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">glossary</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">task</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">idx</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;&gt;&gt;&gt; </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">span</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">source_glossary_matches</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">glossary</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">span</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">shadowed</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>
            <span class="n">entry</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">glossary</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">entry_index</span><span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">entry_is_binding</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">):</span>
                <span class="k">continue</span>
            <span class="n">approved</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot; / &quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">target_terms</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;(none)&quot;</span>
            <span class="n">forbidden</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot; / &quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">forbidden_targets</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;(none)&quot;</span>
            <span class="n">policy</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">require_target</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">policy</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;required&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">forbidden_targets</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">policy</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbidden&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">policy_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;, &quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">policy</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;binding&quot;</span>
            <span class="n">match_policy</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;case-sensitive&quot;</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">case_sensitive</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;case-insensitive&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;# glossary: &quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> -&gt; </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">approved</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">; &quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">policy_text</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">; forbidden: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">forbidden</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">; &quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;target match is literal, boundary-aware, </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">match_policy</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u2013</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\u2014</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;# style: source contains an en/em dash; preserve a German dash cue &quot;</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;(– or —) in the target unless the meaning is truly removed&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">snapshot</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">applicable_termbase</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">note</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sense</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rationale</span>
            <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;# termbase: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">entry_id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> — </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">note</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rstrip</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot; —&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="n">parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">write_text_atomic</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">path</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">parts</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">rstrip</span><span class="p">()</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="se">\n</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">path</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="limit_records_by_words">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.tasks.limit_records_by_words">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">limit_records_by_words</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Mapping</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">SourceRecordView</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">max_words</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return the longest prefix of ``record_ids`` within ``max_words``.</span>

<span class="sd">    The first record is always included when ``record_ids`` is non-empty so a</span>
<span class="sd">    single long record still makes progress.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">max_words</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;max_words must be &gt;= 1&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">selected</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">total</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">words</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_words</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">selected</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">total</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">words</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">max_words</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">break</span>
        <span class="n">selected</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">total</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="n">words</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">selected</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="select_translation_record_ids">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.tasks.select_translation_record_ids">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">select_translation_record_ids</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StatusBundle</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ChapterProgress</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">unit</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">max_words</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Select the record ids for the next translation task within ``chapter``.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">source_by_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_by_id</span>
    <span class="n">pending</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="n">record_id</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_ids_by_chapter</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">translated_by_id</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">pending</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">unit</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[])</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">unit</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;chapter&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">unit</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">pending</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">unit</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;chunk&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">first_chunk_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">pending</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">unit</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="p">[</span>
                <span class="n">record_id</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">pending</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">first_chunk_id</span>
            <span class="p">],</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">unit</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;paragraph&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">first_record</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">pending</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]]</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">first_record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">unit</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;batch&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">same_span</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
                <span class="n">record_id</span>
                <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">pending</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">first_record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span>
            <span class="p">]</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">unit</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">limit_records_by_words</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">same_span</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">max_words</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">unit</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">limit_records_by_words</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">pending</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">max_words</span><span class="p">))</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="create_translation_task">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.tasks.create_translation_task">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">create_translation_task</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StatusBundle</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">chapter</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ChapterProgress</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">RuntimeMode</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">unit</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">requested_max_words</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">todo_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationTask</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Build, persist, and render durable files for one translation task.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.config</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">write_translation_task</span>

    <span class="n">source_by_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_by_id</span>
    <span class="n">translation_version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">baseline_ref</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">baseline_sha</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">context_sha256</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">context_view_sha256</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">context_view_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">context_notes_scope</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">context_target_chapter_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">context_notes_through_chapter_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">source_sha256</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">exists</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">bundle</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">snapshot</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">ready</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">resolution</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">resolve_current_version</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">context_view</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ensure_context_view_snapshot</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">baseline_ref</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">resolution</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">resolution</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">target_chapter_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">translation_version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">resolution</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span>
        <span class="n">baseline_ref</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">resolution</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span>
        <span class="n">baseline_sha</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">resolution</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">baseline_sha256</span>
        <span class="n">context_sha256</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">context_view</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_view_sha256</span>
        <span class="n">context_view_sha256</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">context_view</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_view_sha256</span>
        <span class="n">context_view_path</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">context_view</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_path</span>
        <span class="n">context_notes_scope</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">context_view</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">notes_scope</span>
        <span class="n">context_target_chapter_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">context_view</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_chapter_id</span>
        <span class="n">context_notes_through_chapter_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">context_view</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">notes_through_chapter_id</span>
    <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">translation_version</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_translation_version_ledger</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_version</span>
    <span class="n">record_sources</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">record_ids</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="n">applicable_termbase</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">applicable_termbase_sha256</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">collect_applicable_termbase_for_record_sources</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record_sources</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">mandatory_glossary_fingerprint</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">live_mandatory_glossary_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">task</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">TranslationTask</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">task_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">make_task_id</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">unit</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">unit</span><span class="p">,</span>  <span class="c1"># type: ignore[arg-type]</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapter</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">profile</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_locale</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">translation_version</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">translation_version</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">baseline_ref</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">baseline_ref</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">baseline_sha</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">context_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">context_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">context_view_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">context_view_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">context_view_path</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">context_view_path</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">applicable_termbase_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">applicable_termbase_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">mandatory_glossary_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">mandatory_glossary_fingerprint</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">context_notes_scope</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">context_notes_scope</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">context_target_chapter_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">context_target_chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">context_notes_through_chapter_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">context_notes_through_chapter_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">profile_config_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">canonical_json_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_dump</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;json&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">profile_config</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
            <span class="k">else</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">source_config_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">canonical_json_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_dump</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;json&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">source_words</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">sum</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_words</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">record_ids</span>
        <span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">record_count</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="n">requested_max_words</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">requested_max_words</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">todo_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">todo_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">records</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">[</span>
            <span class="n">TranslationTaskRecord</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_by_id</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="p">),</span>
                <span class="n">applicable_termbase</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">applicable_termbase</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">[]),</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">record_ids</span>
        <span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">write_translation_task</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">write_ingest_template</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">write_block_ingest_template</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">write_task_source_block</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">task</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">task</span></div>

</pre></div>
